zh.lifeSummary: 當Amice De Audley於大約1222年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Henry De Audley48歲，母親Bertrade Mainwaring26歲。她於大約1238年與Peter de Montfort在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年8月4日在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amice De Audley于大约1222年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Henry De Audley48岁，母亲Bertrade Mainwaring26岁。她于大约1238年与Peter de Montfort在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1265年8月4日在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Amice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Amice De Audley was born about 1222, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Henry De Audley, was 48 and her mother, Bertrade Mainwaring, was 26. She married Peter de Montfort about 1238, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 August 1265, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amice De Audley est née environ 1222, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Audley, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Mainwaring, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Peter de Montfort environ 1238, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1265, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amice De Audley um 1222 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Audley 48 und ihre Mutter Bertrade Mainwaring 26. Sie hat um 1238 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England Peter de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. August 1265 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amice De Audley è nata il circa 1222 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Henry De Audley, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Bertrade Mainwaring, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Peter de Montfort circa 1238, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amice De Audleyが約1222年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry De Audleyは48歳，母Bertrade Mainwaringは26歳であった。約1238年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトでPeter de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1265年8月4日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amice De Audley(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Audley(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade Mainwaring(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1238년 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 Peter de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amice De Audley nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Audley, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Mainwaring, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter de Montfort aproximadamente 1238, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1265, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amice De Audley родилась около 1222 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry De Audley было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Mainwaring, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Montfort около 1238 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 августа 1265 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amice De Audley nació aproximadamente 1222, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry De Audley, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Bertrade Mainwaring, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Peter de Montfort aproximadamente 1238, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1265, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
